allow:
Bash(git add src/main.js src/style.css assets/knot-border.svg assets/threebows-favicon.png public/assets/knot-border.svg && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Time picker: backspace from minute focuses hour; fix slide-down-btn centering; add knot-border and favicon assets

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add index.html src/fortune-api.js src/style.css && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Mobile responsiveness: full layout overhaul for 320–768px

- Remove small-screen blocker; all screens now usable on phones
- Tighter border inset \(12px\), consistent 36px top padding across slides
- Slide titles pinned to top at 32px, body copy 1.15rem/line-height 1.35
- Ba Zi chart switches to 2×2 grid with 96px edge clearance
- Two-col slides stack vertically; image above text on slides 4 & 6
- Compat slide centers pills and vertically centers content group
- Lucky slide increased gap and shifted up
- Down arrow 24px from bottom border
- Entry form capped at 332px, title bumped to 2.4rem min
- Fortune overall prompt expanded to 2 descriptive sentences

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name three-bows 2>&1 | tail -5)
